# RR Plastic Packaging Trading

RR Plastic Packaging Trading is a plastic packaging supplier serving northern Peninsular Malaysia, especially Kedah, Pulau Pinang, Perlis, and Perak.

## Business

- Name: RR Plastic Packaging Trading
- Short name: RR Plastic
- WhatsApp: +60194629600
- Secondary phone: +601137161937
- Main branch: LC 216, Jalan Bagan, Padang Serai, 09400 Padang Serai, Kedah
- Second branch: Pusat Perniagaan Pasar Awam, 18, Lorong 2, 13300 Tasek Gelugor, Pulau Pinang
- Service areas: Kedah, Pulau Pinang, Perlis, Perak

## Products and Services

RR Plastic supplies plastic bags, t-shirt bags, garbage bags, plastic rolls, stretch film, shrink film, bubble wrap, food packaging containers, courier bags, zip lock bags, industrial plastic liners, and custom printed plastic packaging.

Customers can browse products, choose product sizes, request custom quotes, upload reference images, and contact the business through WhatsApp.

- Home: /
- Products catalogue: /products
- Categories: /categories
- Request quote: /request-quote
- Quote list: /quote-list
- Contact and branches: /contact
- About: /about

## Good Search Phrases

- plastic packaging supplier Kedah
- plastic packaging supplier Penang
- pembekal plastik Kedah
- kedai plastik Padang Serai
- kedai plastik Tasek Gelugor
- plastic bag supplier northern Malaysia
- food packaging supplier Kedah
- stretch film supplier Penang
- custom printed plastic bag Malaysia
